creator: dmk@ncf.ca
text:
Created attachment 247679
Crash report from Dr Konqi

When I attempt to add a new IMAP server to kmail, everything goes fine until I go to enter the server details in the Account Assistant. There are three fields on the Personal Settings page: Username, Incoming server and Outgoing server.

The crash happens when I attempt to make any changes in the Incoming server field. 

I've generated a crash report, which is attached below.
